windowing: set-a (stride=9, min_seq=5); SAME base as the parallel comparand
role: FENCE (set-a). Canonical FL cascade is dk_ovl, re-homed to the A40 per BASELINE_DISTRIBUTION + #44.
pinned_config: cond_coupling=posterior cond_signal=softmax cond_inject=add cond_detach=True; disable_cross_attn=True (directed cat->region cascade, symmetric channel severed)
comparand_note: parallel = b4 command MINUS the 5 cascade pins (cross-attn ON); SAME device/engine/windowing/selector -> clean cascade-vs-parallel delta. NOT the board dk_ovl stride-1 champion.
method: cat=macro-F1 diag-best; reg=FULL top10_acc indist-best; per-task diagnostic-best, fold-mean (h100_score_matched).
reading: FL set-a: parallel ~= cascade (cat +0.08 tie, reg +0.42) -> DEAD TIE, consistent with the canonical dk_ovl #44 finding. (M4 small-state AL/AZ showed parallel>cascade; the gap shrinks at FL scale.)
